crews.name: Armadas - 5/6/Miles

Most effective on a ship with lots of shots, so consider chcking the firing pattern of your ship to see how effective Miles will be for you.

crews.name: Armadas - Best Loot Crew - Need MAX TOS Scotty
crews.notes: Best possible Loot Crew for Armadas - I Stress that TOS Scotty and Five of Eleven need to be maxed to switch out to this crew for more armada loot.

crews.name: Armadas - Boosted Changeling Kira
crews.notes: Pike and Moreau can be substituted for Picard and Beverley.This crew will boost the effectivness of Kira's officer ablity, thus providing decreased mitigation from the target armada for the whole team.

crews.name: Armadas - Boosted Miles
crews.notes: Pike and Moreau can be substituted for Picard and Beverley. This crew will boost the effectivness of Miles O'briens officer ablity and get closer to a guarentee of increasing the chance of the ability activating and providing extra shots.

crews.name: Armadas - Borg - Sacrificial Lamb
crews.notes: Only for the Vidar, this crew removes the crit CHANCE completely Vs borg armadas. Requires full synergy and 5 is interchangeable with 8 if either busy elsewhere or not yet obtained. This crew should be run by just one member of your team and used on the weakest ship.

crews.name: Armadas - Borg - Vi'Dar - 5/6/Lorca
crews.notes: Stack lower decks for Attack and Health

crews.name: Armadas - Breach ship loadout(Gorkon)
crews.notes: Used as a support ship for armada to apply breach to the armada that the whole team benefits from. this is run with Morale to increase survivability.

crews.name: Armadas - Breach ship loadout(Lorca)
crews.notes: Used as a support ship for armada to apply breach to the armada that the whole team benefits from. this is run with Morale to increase survivability.

crews.name: Armadas - Burning ship loadout(Georgiou)
crews.notes: Used as a support ship for armada to apply burning to the armada that the whole team benefits from. this is run with Morale to increase survivability.

crews.name: Armadas - Burning ship loadout(Nero)
crews.notes: Used as a support ship for armada to apply burning to the armada that the whole team benefits from. this is run with Morale to increase survivability. If you have Georgiou, then her burning ability is more reliable and should be used over this crew ideally.

crews.name: Armadas - Chakotay - Full Synergy
crews.notes: Full Synergy Crew for Chakotay to double your shots. Iso lytic Cascade from Janeway and increase crit damage from Seven (made more potent by increase of crit chance also from Chakotay). This is all out attack based so consider Tom Paris below deck and stacking for Defence for some mitigation.

crews.name: Armadas - DS9  - Sisko/Miles/Changeling Kira
crews.notes: Stack Attack for Kira and Health for Sisko. Miles will be effective at lower than the reccomended level but far more potent from rank 3. Sisko Full Synergy, Offers a Higher mitigation boost than 5 of eleven, and this may be over kill as the limit is c. 71.2%. if you can get to that figure with one side of synergy, consider swapping out Kira for another officer such as Khan, lorca or six of eleven (if using six, then would need to stack some attack to increase effectivness)

crews.name: Armadas - Early Level - Burning (No Epics)
crews.notes: Basic Burning Crew, Arix is first officer you will likely unlock which can proc burning and 2 sides of synergy help to increase this chance. Stack Health for Vemet ability. once Georgiou or Nero unlocked move to other crews. NOTE: if using a battleship class, swapping Kumak for one of the battleship specific officers from Nero's crew could be beneficial

crews.name: Armadas - Early Level - Hull Breach (No Epics)
crews.notes: Basic Breach crew, needs Azetbur to Proc breach and needs your ship to have a kinetic weapon. Synergy with other officers increase its effectiveness while offering additional bonuses from their respective abilities. Once Gorkon or Lorca unlocked, even at rank one, switch to alternative Hull Breach Crew. for additional Stats M'Ral can be swapped for Chang but note that his ability does not work against armadas.

crews.name: Armadas - Early Level - Morale (No Epics)
crews.notes: Morale is the key to this Crew, however without kirk sulu is the best option. once Kirk unlocked then move to the more advanced crews using him. Bones as side officer boosts defence and therefore improving spocks ability.

crews.name: Armadas - Eclipse alternative
crews.notes: Stack Health and Defence for Beverley. Beverley offers both shield regeneration and mitigation. Khan and lorca combined offer the ability to deal huge damage with increase in Critical chance and hull breach. This crew will need stella research to be quite advanced M50+ roughly. This crew will not replace Kirk, Spock & Khan, but is a great alternative if Kirk and Spock are busy elseware.

crews.name: Armadas - Janeway full Synergy
crews.notes: Full Synergy Janeway offers full Shiled mitigation once you have taken hull damage once meaning all damage is going to shield. B'Elanna Torres is increasing piercing in all 3 stat categories. Janeway provides Isolytic cascade to damage and Isolytic Artifacts in play. Side officers to accompany janeway selected as others have potentially better uses below deck, but any Voyager Group officers will provide fully synergy values to Janeway.

crews.name: Armadas - Kirk/Spock/6
crews.notes: Stack lower decks for Defence and Attack

crews.name: Armadas - Kirk/Spock/Khan
crews.notes: Stack lower decks for Defence

crews.name: Armadas - Loot Crew
crews.notes: Provides a good loot multiplyer available from armadas. Tolra and Toli with Synergy add additional attack abilities vs Armadas. Consider adding The Doctor below deck for even more loot. See max loot armada crew if you have TOS Scotty Maxed.

crews.name: Armadas - Max Crit Damage reducer (Picard)
crews.notes: Gaila Must be MAXED for best results. added benefit over using the pike version of this crew due to the Crit damage officer ability from Picard. This crew reduces critical DAMAGE (different to Critical hit CHANCE). multiple may be required to fully remove all damage when fighting armadas. Scan the armada and check its critical damage to find out how much you need to remove. this crew with maxed Gaila will reduce crit damage by 110%

crews.name: Armadas - Max Crit Damage reducer (Pike)
crews.notes: Gaila Must be MAXED for best results. This crew reduces critical DAMAGE (different to Critical hit CHANCE). multiple may be required to fully remove all damage when fighting armadas. Scan the armada and check its critical damage to find out how much you need to remove. this crew with maxed Gaila will reduce crit damage by 110%. Please Note that Moreau ability will NOT work agaist armadas, she is just there to provide synergy to Pike, to boost Gaila ability!

crews.name: Armadas - Max Damage - Chakotay
crews.notes: This crew offers the best chance of throwing the most Damage at an armada with 2  officers that increase shots is Chakotay and Miles O'Brien. This is all out damage and to add some defensive ability consider using Tom Paris below deck and stack him for defence.

crews.name: Armadas - Max Damage crew
crews.notes: 6 needs to be min t3 for this loadout. stack attack for 6. this crews offers little by the way of survivability. purely used to through the most damage, increase penetration and crit rate

crews.name: Armadas - Riker and Morale
crews.notes: Stack for defence for Spock

crews.name: Armadas - Riker on Enterprise
crews.notes: Only for Enterprise to ensure you are activating its Ship ability. the Higher the rank of Beverley the better but her main purpose is to provide synergy to Riker to increase damage each round. Stack for Defence for Beverley.

crews.name: Armadas - Riker plus Penetration
crews.notes: Stack for Defence and Attack. Offers Damage boost from riker each round. Mitigation from beverley and Penetration boost from Six Of Eleven. Beverley also provides Synergy to riker boosting his captains maneuver.

crews.name: Armadas - Riker/Bev/Khan
crews.notes: Stack defence for Beverley. Beverley adds Synergy to Riker, increasing damage output and khan increase crit rate. Beverley Level is the higher the better for increased mitigation, but this will hit the maximum mitigation cap even at lower ranks providing you have the officer stats to back it up.

crews.name: Armadas - Sisko, Miles & Janeway
crews.notes: Stack Health for Sisko. Mitigation boost, crit change increase from Sisko, boosted mitigation from miles synergy plus extra shots. Janeway provides Isolytic cascade to damage and Isolytic Artifacts in play.

crews.name: Armadas - Sisko, Miles & Six
crews.notes: Stack Health for Sisko and Attack for Six. This crew provided Massive mitigation from Sisko aswell as increased Crit Chance. Miles adds extra shots and the higher the Tier the better!! Six increases Piercing stats. Although you are giving up Loot provided by normal Crews using Five of Eleven, this is the best all round armada crew with regards to Damage taken and damage Dealt as ALL abilities have Damage Focused!

crews.name: Armadas - Troi crit reducer - Exchange Armadas
crews.notes: Exchange armadas have a crit chance of 20% this crew will remove all critical shots thrown by the armada as troi will have one side of Synergy. Data can be swapped for any other office not from the scient class for the same effect from troi. Khan can be swapped for deius if lower than a t3 khan is held

crews.name: Armadas - Troi crit reducer - Normal Armadas
crews.notes: Normal armadas have a crit chance of 10% this crew will remove all critical shots thrown by the armada. Whilst still providing the survivability offered by Kirk and Spock. ON G3 ENTERPRISE ONLY: swap Spock for Khan/Decius

crews.name: Armadas - Troi crit reducer - Swarm Armadas
crews.notes: Normal armadas have a crit chance of 10% this crew will remove all critical shots thrown by the armada. Whilst still providing the survivability offered by Kirk and Spock. If you have Jaylah then swap Kirk for Jaylah and Khan for spock.

crews.name: Armadas - Very Early Level - Cadets
crews.notes: Very Basic crew. This crew would only be used by under level 20 players wanting to try their arm in an armada. once you start to build your officer deck move to the other Early level crew suggestions ASAP.

crews.name: Base Cracking - Enterprise & HGW
crews.notes: Khan should always be captain for Base cracking

crews.name: Base Cracking - Harrison
crews.notes: Great if punching up using cheaper ship, Ideally a Saladin to to max damage early on. Swap Joachim to kirk on enterprise

crews.name: Base Cracking - Harrison & Mudd 2.0
crews.notes: Great if punching up using cheaper ship, Ideally a Saladin to to max damage early on. also very good on ships that fire lots of shots in the first round.

crews.name: Base Cracking - Honorguard Worf
crews.notes: Khan should always be captain for Base cracking

crews.name: Base Cracking - Kras Counter
crews.notes: This set up will only work if Kras is being used without fully synergy on a ship of your opponent. The 2 side officers boost Roms ability that still allows Roms captains manouve to activate. 2 side officers need to be max rank to be effective. If opponent is using Kras with full synergy then revert to Khan based cracking crews.

crews.name: Base Cracking - No Khan
crews.notes: Swap for Khan variants as soon as he is unlocked. Khan is the key for Base cracking!

crews.name: Base Cracking - No Khan - Enterprise
crews.notes: Swap for Khan variants as soon as he is unlocked. Khan is the key for Base cracking! Kati Can be swapped for Marla, but increase in crit damage offered by Kati can be more valuable than the stat boost offered by Marla. Also if a hull breach officer unlocked (Gorkon or Lorca), that would be a good replacement for Kati.

crews.name: Base Cracking - No Khan & Survivability
crews.notes: Base cracking option not using Khan. NOT for use on a G3 epic enterprise as spock is not required. offers Joachims, base -specific ability and the survivability from the shield regeneration given by Kirk and Spock

crews.name: Base Cracking - No Khan but HGW
crews.notes: Swap for Khan variants as soon as he is unlocked. Khan is the key for Base cracking! Kati Can be swapped for Marla, but increase in crit damage offered by Kati can be more valuable than the stat boost offered by Marla. Also if a hull breach officer unlocked (Gorkon or Lorca), that would be a good replacement for Kati.

crews.name: Base Cracking - Rom Critical Build
crews.notes: Rom is the best Base Cracking officer in the game he increases the Shots with his officer ability, but main power is in the Captain Manoeuvre which prevents you from being hit in the first round. In addition to Roms abilities this ensure max damage output with hull breach and increased critical chance. Gorkon can be swapped for Lorca

crews.name: Base Cracking - Rom Max Early Damage
crews.notes: Rom is the best Base Cracking officer in the game he increases the Shots with his officer ability, but main power is in the Captain Manoeuvre which prevents you from being hit in the first round. This crew does rely on Rng for maximum effectivness. should mudd activate then you will increase the number of shots in the first round. That, coupled with Harrisons round one ability which affects the split of damage that goes to Hull and shields after mitigation gives you the best chance to cause maximum damage in round 1 without being hit.

crews.name: Base Cracking - Rom on Enterprise
crews.notes: Rom is the best Base Cracking officer in the game he increases the Shots with his officer ability, but main power is in the Captain Manoeuvre which prevents you from being hit in the first round.  This crew allows the enterprise to keep shields up while increasing critical chance from Honorguard Worf to issue maximum damage during the battle.

crews.name: Base Cracking - Rom with Burning
crews.notes: Rom is the best Base Cracking officer in the game he increases the Shots with his officer ability, but main power is in the Captain Manoeuvre which prevents you from being hit in the first round. Great crew when hitting a bigger target as guarantees (unless rom counter crew is being used by opponent) burning to be applied to the opponents target so you will definitely inflict damage.

crews.name: Base Cracking - Rom with Morale
crews.notes: Rom is the best Base Cracking officer in the game he increases the Shots with his officer ability, but main power is in the Captain Manoeuvre which prevents you from being hit in the first round. stack defence. This crew offers survivability and the benefits offered by Rom.

crews.name: Base Defence - Breach+Burning - BOLD Defense
crews.notes: (Ship 5 - Fortunate) Use this on a survey, which are hit last, as you want this ship to survive as long as possible to trigger both breach and burning to cause additional damage from defense platforms. CREDIT - BOLD Defense - (Full BOLD Defense PDF availiable in the crew chat channel on our discord)

crews.name: Base Defence - Extra Shield Strip - BOLD Defense
crews.notes: (Ship 3 - T2 Turas) Use full synergy for tilly for an extra shield strip of the opponent ship, works in tandom with the Jellyfish-Yuki crew to strip all shileds by round 2. CREDIT - BOLD Defense - (Full BOLD Defense PDF availiable in the crew chat channel on our discord)

crews.name: Base Defence - Max Shield bypass - BOLD Defense
crews.notes: (Ship 2 - T1 Turas) Harrisons captains manouvre diverts damage from shield to the hull. This combination boosts Harrisons ability to maximise damage to hull . Can swap Pike and Moreau for Picard and Beverley for the same results CREDIT - BOLD Defense - (Full BOLD Defense PDF availiable in the crew chat channel on our discord)

crews.name: Base Defence - Max Shield Strip - BOLD Defense
crews.notes: (Ship 4 - Baby Jellyfish or T2 Turas)  Best on baby jelly, as the ship ability increases to remove all shileds in round one. Strips shields of your oponent quickly meaning your damage starts to go to Hull much faster, therfore improving chances of winning. Can swap Pike and Moreau for Picard and Beverley for the same results. Can use anther ship but result will not be as prevelant without the Jelly fish ability. Athough Harrison can be used to provide additional synergy for Yuki, He is better used on a different ship for base defence. CREDIT - BOLD Defense - (Full BOLD Defense PDF availiable in the crew chat channel on our discord)

crews.name: Base Defence - Rom Counter - BOLD Defense
crews.notes: (Ship 1 - Realta) Can swap side officers to more damage based if needed for example Honorguard Worf This set up negates the effect of Roms captains manouvre. Komal and Rukor can be swapped for other officers in the group as long as they have the same officer type (engineering, command & science). Full synergy is only needed if Rom is being used by your oponent in conjunction with Next gen Crusher and Cader McCoy who will be boosting Roms ability. CREDIT - BOLD Defense - (Full BOLD Defense PDF availiable in the crew chat channel on our discord)

crews.notes: Five needs to be at leat rank 2 to outperform other crews durign our limited testing. Stack Attack for SNW Uhura. NB: Consider running SNW La'an underdeck for a boost to your cargo space.

crews.name: Chimera - Damage event crew
crews.notes: Scoring for the event, is based on the highest damage dealt in one round of the combat so Good adding crit chance and coupled with Boosts from Cerritos and Titan really help in this regard. Consider B'Elanna below deck for breach and Paris for mitigation.

crews.name: Chimera - Focus on Isolytic
crews.notes: The boost from Picard and Beverley enhance Janeways ability to throw out massive isoltic damage. Remember below deck to enhance this further from states (hull breach, morale and burning) and check mitigation on your first run to see if you need to add Paris for additional mitigation.

crews.name: Chimera - Loot Crew
crews.notes: This is the best crew for loot against the chimera.  Tolra with Toli Synergy is offering Loot and also the chance for extra shots. Making a more viable crew than the E-Pic officers who will not work here. This is an advanced crew generaly and rely on you having Max B'Elanna Torres, Neelix  etc below deck for abilities. Also Tom Paris (stack Defence) for mitigation and the Doc for more loot. Other than the very highest players will be able to hit high levels without needing boosts from Cerritos and Titan.

crews.name: Chimera - Loot plus Hull Breach
crews.notes: Tolra with Toli Synergy is offering Loot and also the chance for extra shots. Making a more viable crew that the E-Pic officers who will not work here. Without a max B'Elanna Torres this is a great crew to get hull breach. Consider Gorkon if Lorca is very low tier but his activation is less reliable.

crews.notes: For best effect Yuki and Charvanek need to be minimum Rank 4. Yuki officer ability also is increase damage vs Romulans to extra potent vs Romulan battleships (Legionary, Augur and Tribune)

crews.name: Enterprise - VS Jelly

crews.name: Entities - Loot plus Iso damage - no Demarco

crews.name: Entities - Max Isolytic

crews.name: Entities - Max Isolytic- No Jean Luc Picard

crews.name: Entities - No demaro with Iso and shield bypass

crews.name: Entities - Shield Bypass and Iso

crews.name: General - 5/Morale
crews.notes: Stack lower decks for Health and Defence

crews.name: General PVP - Honorguard Worf
crews.notes: Lorca can be substituted for Gorkon if not attained, but Lorca has provided better results. Also if gorkon is used then replace Captain Tilly for Kerla

SNW Una can be swapped for Hemmer is you plan to hit surveys too, but Una increases impulse to speed up your run. Check effectiveness of this crew and also swapping Khan for SNW Una to see which yields the best results.

crews.name: Hostiles - 52+ - Explorer vs Interceptor
crews.notes: REMEMBER: This crew is only effective when attacking with the battle triangle. Stack Defence for SNW Spock. SNW Una can be swapped for Hemmer is you plan to hit surveys too, but Una increases impulse to speed up your run. Check effectiveness of this crew and also swapping Khan for SNW Una to see which yields the best results.

crews.name: Hostiles - 52+ - Generic
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Beverley. this crew generically works for 52+ hostiles where Chen and T'laan are no longer effective. Strange new world Officers can prove better than this set up once they are sufficiently levelled.

crews.name: Hostiles - 52+ - Interceptor vs Battleship
crews.notes: REMEMBER: This crew is only effective when attacking with the battle triangle. Stack Attack for SNW Uhura. SNW Una can be swapped for Hemmer is you plan to hit surveys too, but Una increases impulse to speed up your run. Check effectiveness of this crew and also swapping Khan for SNW Una to see which yields the best results.

crews.name: Hostiles - 52+ - Survey Ships
crews.notes: Stack Health for Hemmer. SNW Ortegas is reccomended as her primary statistic is health to feed Hemmer while still offering full synergy to Pike. this is a versitile crew and depending what ship you are using and what system you are hitting hosties. Change SNW Ortegas for the relevant officer to fit this if needed.

crews.name: Hostiles - 52+ - Survey Ships Alternative
crews.notes: Stack Health For Hemmer. Alternative crew to using full synergy. See which works best for your Levels of officers.

crews.name: Hostiles - 8472 Bio Ships - Basic (<52 level Hostiles)
crews.notes: Can Swap Pike & Moreau for TNG Picard & TNG Beverley (then you stack defense for Beverley). Old Faithful crew that works on the lower hostiles well.  As with any setup, Hugh below deck will vastly improve the capability of this crew.

crews.name: Hostiles - 8472 Bio Ships - Breach & Kang
crews.notes: Stack attack for Kang, Health for Five of Eleven. This crew adds loot per hostile and mitigation from Five. Increases piercing as all these hostiles are interceptors and also Lorca provides Hull breach to try and end the fight faster. If you have the Doctor try and add him lower deck to increase loot per hostile. The key against these hostiles is to kill in less than 8 rounds as there is a weapon in round 8 that will obliterate most ships in the game with one shot. this does work on Voyager, however until cargo capacity is big enough you may want to use other warships. As with any setup, Hugh below deck will vastly improve the capability of this crew.

crews.name: Hostiles - 8472 Bio Ships - Tal
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five of Eleven. Can Swap Georgiou for Nero. this crew adds loot per hostile and mitigation from Five. If you have the Doctor try and add him lower deck to increase loot per hostile. The key against these hostiles is to kill in less than 8 rounds as there is a weapon in round 8 that will obliterate most ships in the game with one shot. this does work on Voyager, however until cargo capacity is big enough you may want to use other warships. As with any setup, Hugh below deck will vastly improve the capability of this crew.

crews.name: Hostiles - Actian - Five, Four & Kang
crews.notes: Stack Attack for Kang and Health for Five. Five and Four combined offer mitigation, increased Cargo space and additional loot. Kang is key to this crew as he increases accurancy to be able to kill the Apex variants of the hostiles more effectivley as they are Interceptors. Consider adding SNW La'an to increase Cargo space and Ghalenar to increase Venom drops from hostiles.

crews.name: Hostiles - Actian - G4 Rare Ship or above
crews.notes: G4 Rare ship Ideally to take advantage of the Loot bonus ship ability. Put SNW La'an below deck for extra cargo space if needed. Stack Health as a priority for more Hull. This crew gives good survivability by increasing your own mitigation and extra Loot from Five of Eleven. Actian Hostiles have lots of shileds so Yuki helps get through them quickly and khan increases the critical hit chance helping you to kill more quickly.

crews.name: Hostiles - Actian - Mantis - Alternative
crews.notes: Put SNW La'an below deck for extra cargo space if needed. Stack Health for Five of Eleven. This crew gives good survivability by increasing your own mitigation and extra Loot from Five of Eleven and takes advantage of the 100% critical hit chance exo comp with gorkon providing Hull Breach to kill the hostiles quicker. Consider swapping Khan for Kang as an alternative to increase piercing. Can swap Gorkon for Lorca if needed.

crews.name: Hostiles - Actian - Mantis - Full Loot with Mitigation
crews.notes: Put SNW La'an below deck for extra cargo space if needed. Stack Health for Five of Eleven. This crew gives good survivability by increasing your own mitigation and extra Loot from Five of Eleven and increases the cargo Space to beable to fit more cargo in per run.

crews.name: Hostiles - Actian - Tal+Loot punch Up
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five of eleven.  Only target Actians and not really for the mantis. This crew allows you to puch up to basically the highest Actians in the game starting at about the ops 42 ships. Hugh, Belanna Torres, The doctor, Ghalenar below deck are solid reccomendations. Tal at t1 means that maximum number of rounds for the battle is 20 while burning (reducing with a high tier Tal, higher if not maintaining burning.)

crews.name: Hostiles - Assimilated Continuum - E-Data
crews.notes: These Hostiles punch hard, need to focus on Damage output from Lower Decks, Chapel, Hugh etc. Try and stick to Triangle.

crews.name: Hostiles - Assimilated Continuum - General
crews.notes: These Hostiles punch hard, need to focus on Damage output from Lower Decks, Chapel, Hugh etc. Try and stick to Triangle.

crews.name: Hostiles - Assimilated Continuum - Nesmith
crews.notes: These Hostiles punch hard, need to focus on Damage output from Lower Decks, Chapel, Hugh etc. This crew seems to work best against Interceptor hostiles.

crews.name: Hostiles - Augment AutoGrind - Reliant
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Spock and Attack for Tyler. You need Burning for this crew to be effective so Max Neelix below deck is essential. If you are filling cargo on your runs, consider adding E-Data or SNW La'an below deck for additinal Cargo capacity.

crews.name: Hostiles - Augment Autogrind with Reliant
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Spock, Needs burning to function so ideally max Neelix below deck but t4 will still be useful. Other standard below decks for hostiles such as B'elanna Torres, Hugh etc also make more potent.

crews.name: Hostiles - Basic - BShips/Exp/Surv (Cadets(<52  Hostiles))
crews.notes: Chen rank is vital push to max ASAP. Can swap Cadet Kirk for Cadet Mcoy.

crews.name: Hostiles - Basic - Interceptors (Cadets(<52 level Hostiles))
crews.notes: Tlaan rank is vital push to max ASAP. Can swap Cadet Kirk for Cadet Mccoy. NB: if you have Cath unlocked from the Ferrengi officers at a rank offering a higher damage reduction percentage than your T'laan then swap Cath her over T'laan.

crews.name: Hostiles - Basic - Interceptors (TNG(<52 level Hostiles))
crews.notes: Tlaan rank is vital push to max ASAP. Direct alternative to Cadet crew and to be used until Pike is unlocked. Can swap Next Gen Data for Next Gen Crusher. NB: if you have Cath unlocked from the Ferrengi officers at a rank offering a higher damage reduction percentage than your T'laan then swap Cath her over T'laan.

crews.name: Hostiles - Basic-BShip/Exp/Surv(TNG, <52 level Hostiles)
crews.notes: Chen rank is vital push to max ASAP. Direct alternative to Cadet crew and to be used until Pike is unlocked. Can swap Next Gen Data for Next Gen Crusher

crews.name: Hostiles - Battleship Parts Grind
crews.notes: Stack Attack for SNW Uhura. Use PIC Beverley Crusher below decks. This crews should be used within triangle to grind parts for an alternative ship type - I.e Use an explorer to Grind Interceptor Parts. Five is simply used for Loot and the SNW combo specifically works with the triangle to assist in combat!

crews.name: Hostiles - Best Rep Increase crew
crews.notes: This crew is totally focusing on loot and Ent-E Picard with Synergy generates a 100% bonus to reputation gains in addition from the bonus based on your tier of 5 of eleven. Consider adding the Doctor, Alonzo Freeman below deck if you have room for additional reputation gains.

crews.name: Hostiles - Breen
crews.notes: NEED T5 Torres below decks. Good for survival and maximum kills per hull.

crews.name: Hostiles - BShips/Exp/Surv (Picard(<52 level Hostiles))
crews.notes: Chen rank is vital push to max ASAP. Better to use Pike version of this crew if you need to level the ship you are using at the same time.

crews.name: Hostiles - BShips/Exp/Surv (Pike(<52 level Hostiles))
crews.notes: Chen rank is vital push to max ASAP

crews.name: Hostiles - Eclipse - 5/Morale/Stella
crews.notes: Stack lower decks for Health and Defence

crews.name: Hostiles - Explorer Parts Grind
crews.notes: Stack Health for SNW Ortegas. Use PIC Beverley Crusher below decks. This crews should be used within triangle to grind parts for an alternative ship type - I.e Use an explorer to Grind Interceptor Parts. Five is simply used for Loot and the SNW combo specifically works with the triangle to assist in combat!

crews.name: Hostiles - Freebooters - Tal - vs Battleships
crews.notes: Only hit battleships with an interceptor with this crew! Stack Attack for SNW Uhura. Great Punch up Crew for Hostiles with large hull and Low damage per round. you need buring to activate Tal who is the key to this crew, so can swap Nero for Georgiou if you yield better results

crews.name: Hostiles - Freebooters - Tal - vs Explorers
crews.notes: Stack Health for SNW Ortegas. Great Punch up Crew for Hostiles with large hull and Low damage per round. you need buring to activate Tal who is the key to this crew, so can swap Nero for Georgiou if you yield better results

crews.name: Hostiles - Freebooters - Tal - vs Interceptors
crews.notes: Only Hit interceptors with an explorer with this crew!! Stack Defence for SNW Spock. Great Punch up Crew for Hostiles with large hull and Low damage per round. you need buring to activate Tal who is the key to this crew, so can swap Nero for Georgiou if you yield better results

crews.name: Hostiles - Gorn - Alternative Loot Crew
crews.notes: When considering this crew you need to see if your tier of Five of Eleven would be better. With a T3 or lower Five of eleven Chapel offers a better loot bonus. T4 or t5 Chapel is higher bonus than a max Five so always going to offer a better bonus, but be mindful that you are giving up her Below deck Isolytic cascade bonus.

crews.name: Hostiles - Gorn - Alternative Mudd Crew
crews.notes: Stack Attack for Ro Mudd. Harry Mudd has a chance of diverting Damage from Hull to shields and adding additional shots to the first round. Ro Mudd Provides Synergy to Harry Mudd and increases Damage and Ent-E Data providing additional Isolytic Cascade.

crews.name: Hostiles - Gorn - Annorax
crews.notes: Pelia reducing Iso Damage from the Gorn Hunters, and onnorax increasing apex barrier to take the hostiles down more handily.

crews.name: Hostiles - Gorn - Full Isolytic
crews.notes: All officers provide a boost to Isolytic cascade. consider adding Chapel to lower decks for even more. Also adding Crits and Hull breach bleow deck with Belanna Torres and Hugh will increase damage output and therfore isolytic too.

crews.name: Hostiles - Gorn - Isolytic and Loot
crews.notes: Isolytic damage provided from janeway and Ent-E Data and Loot from 5. Janeway also providing additional Shield mitigation as captain, diverting damage from hull to Shields.

crews.name: Hostiles - Gorn - Isolytic damage Pike boost
crews.notes: Pike is boosting the Isolytic cascade abilities of both Ent-E Data and janeway. great crew if you do not have Ent-E Picard.

crews.name: Hostiles - Gorn - SNW Sam Kirk
crews.notes: Note that Gorn are only affected by Isolytic damage. SNW Sam Kirk ensures that more of your damage goes direct to the hull. Harrison is doing similar rendering damage faster. Ent E Data is providing the boost to Isolytic cascade increasing damage output to the hostile. Hugh, Belanna Torres, Tom Paris, Chapel are all great options for below deck.

crews.name: Hostiles - Heavy Capital Traders - with Khan Crit events!
crews.notes: This crew can be used on any g3 epic ship or above (around tier 5 or above). consider swapping Khan for Georgiou if on an augur for the damage boost. Furthermore once you get into using g4 ships at tiers 5+ swapping back to a Pike Moreau Tlaan/ / Picard Beverley Tlaan crew could get more kills!

crews.name: Hostiles - Heavy Capital Traders-Tlaan
crews.notes: When unable to kill with Pike, moreau Tlaan / Picard Beverley tlaan. This crew can be used on any g3 epic ship or above (around tier 5 or above). consider swapping Tlaan for Georgiou if on an augur for the damage boost. Furthermore once you get into using g4 ships at tiers 5+ swapping back to a Pike Moreau Tlaan/ / Picard Beverley Tlaan crew could get more kills!

crews.name: Hostiles - Hirogen Hostiles Elite - 5 & Tal
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five of Eleven. Can Swap Georgiou for Nero. this crew adds loot per hostile and mitigation from Five. If you have the Doctor try and add him lower deck to increase loot per hostile. The key against these hostiles is to kill in less than 10 rounds as there is a weapon in round 10 that will fire 10 shots and be very deadly to most ships. This does work on Voyager, however until cargo capacity is big enough you may want to use other warships. As with any setup, Hugh below deck will vastly improve the capability of this crew.

crews.name: Hostiles - Hirogen Hostiles Elite - Basic (<52 level Hostiles)
crews.notes: Can Swap Pike & Moreau for TNG Picard & TNG Beverley (then you stack defense for Beverley). Old Faithful crew that works on the lower hostiles well.  As with any setup, Hugh below deck will vastly improve the capability of this crew.

crews.name: Hostiles - Hirogen Hostiles Elite - Breach and Char
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five of Eleven and Charvenek. This crew adds loot per hostile and mitigation from Five. Increases piercing as all these hostiles are battleships and also Lorca provides Hull breach to try and end the fight faster. If you have the Doctor try and add him lower deck to increase loot per hostile. The key against these hostiles is to kill in less than 10 rounds as there is a weapon in round 10 that will fire 9 shots and be very deadly. This does work on Voyager, however until cargo capacity is big enough you may want to use other warships to grind relics. As with any setup, Hugh below deck will vastly improve the capability of this crew.

crews.name: Hostiles - Impulse Crew - Ent E Riker
crews.notes: SPEEEEEEEEED.. Remember Kuron Requires yopu to hit a hostile before his speed boost takes effect

crews.name: Hostiles - Interceptor Parts Grind
crews.notes: Stack Defence for SNW Spock. Use PIC Beverley Crusher below decks. This crews should be used within triangle to grind parts for an alternative ship type - I.e Use an explorer to Grind Interceptor Parts. Five is simply used for Loot and the SNW combo specifically works with the triangle to assist in combat!

crews.name: Hostiles - Interceptors (Picard(<52 level Hostiles))
crews.notes: Tlaan rank is vital push to max ASAP.Better to use Pike version of this crew if you need to level the ship you are using at the same time. NB: if you have Cath unlocked from the Ferrengi officers at a rank offering a higher damage reduction percentage than your T'laan then swap Cath her over T'laan.

crews.name: Hostiles - Interceptors (Pike(<52 level Hostiles))
crews.notes: Tlaan rank is vital push to max ASAP.NB: if you have Cath unlocked from the Ferrengi officers at a rank offering a higher damage reduction percentage than your T'laan then swap Cath her over T'laan.

crews.name: Hostiles - Janeway + Rep gain
crews.notes: Shield mitigation altered by Janeway and synergy, meaning less damage to hull while grinding reds, as often shields do not fall against most hostiles. If they do fall consider alternative crew to improve survivability. janeway also provides Isolytic cascade to damage and Isolytic Artifacts in play. Harry Kim and Five increse rep Gains for Klingon, Romulan and Federation. The Doctor below deck will increase rep gains further.

crews.name: Hostiles - Janeway full Synergy
crews.notes: Full Synergy Janeway offers full Shiled mitigation once you have taken hull damage once meaning all damage is going to shield. B'Elanna Torres is increasing piercing in all 3 stat categories. Janeway provides Isolytic cascade to damage and Isolytic Artifacts in play. Side officers to accompany janeway selected as others have potentially better uses below deck, but any Voyager Group officers will provide fully synergy values to Janeway.

crews.name: Hostiles - Mirror Universe - Punch up Rep Grind
crews.notes: Punch Up crew for rep grinding. Titan and Cerritos boosts while punching up during your time. then drop down a level of hostiles to finish your run once boosts expire.

crews.name: Hostiles - Mirror Universe Max Loot
crews.notes: If Five of eleven less than Rank 3, consider using ent E data for Synergy. All officers boot loot when fighting the mirror hostiles.

crews.name: Hostiles - Mirror Universe Speed & Loot
crews.notes: This crew blends Loot and Speed to make the most of the limeded time available in the MU. Remember to hit a hostile before entering Mirror Space to Activate Kurons Speed boost.

crews.name: Hostiles - Monaveen alternative (max B'elanna)
crews.notes: Stack Health for Oretgas. Hugh and Max B'Elanna below deck. B'Elanna is essential to this crew for the hull breach. other wise consider other crew for monaveen grindingincorporating Lorca for this vital ability.

crews.name: Hostiles - Monaveen Grinding
crews.notes: Stack health for Ortegas and Five of Eleven. If B'ellana Torres at high rank consider swapping out Lorca as would not be needed for hull breach. Hugh Below Deck will add additonal potency for this crew

crews.name: Hostiles - New Augment - Loot crew - Best
crews.notes: This would be the optimum crew for hitting all new augment hostiles but lacks combat abilities as it focuses on Loot gain. If only tier 1 Rachel Garrent consider using Five of Eleven in place of Rachel Garrett. Consider adding Byr and The doctor below deck for additional loot and you may also wish to use Ent-E Data and SNW La'an for additional cargo space.

crews.name: Hostiles - New Augment - Negate ISO
crews.notes: Aims to reduce Iso damage, T4 Pelia reduces it to zero. WOK Carol Marcus below deck greatly survivability.

crews.name: Hostiles - New Augment - Puchdown/Loot crew
crews.notes: Aiming to maximise splicer loot gained per hostile. If Rachel Garrett obtained more than tier 1 then use her in place of Five of Eleven as her officer ability and synergy to Ent-E Picard will yeild a better return. Consider adding Byr and The doctor below deck for additional loot and you may also wish to use Ent-E Data and SNW La'an for additional cargo space.

crews.name: Hostiles - New Augment - Punch up
crews.notes: Stack Health for The Doctor. Shield mitigation boosts from Janeway and Mitigation and synergy provided by the Doctor. Chaos and Forbidden tech has proved essential when deciding to puch up against these hostiles so choose wisley. Ensure you use best tools below deck, B'elana Torres, Paris, WoK McCoy, Kim, Neelix, Hugh etc.. Annorax provides essential apex barrier against these hostiles.

crews.name: Hostiles - New Augment - Rep Grind
crews.notes: Less than rank 3 Five of Eleven, use Epicard with full synergy for better results. This differs from loot crew as WoK Carol does not function for reputation.

crews.name: Hostiles - New Augment - Speed crew
crews.notes: Useful in busy systems to get to the hostiles quicker.

crews.name: Hostiles - Picard w/ Ent-E Data - 51+ hostiles mainly
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Beverly. Mainly for use with 52+ level hostiles, as Chen/Tlaan are no longer effective. The boost from Picard to Data's officer ability increases isolytic damage output and includes cascade.

crews.name: Hostiles - Picard w/ Ent-E Picard - 51+ hostiles mainly
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Beverly. Mainly for use with 52+ level hostiles, as Chen/Tlaan are no longer effective. The boost from Picards's officer ability increases isolytic damage output for 3 rounds by a percentage each time you hit with a weapon and includes cascade.

crews.name: Hostiles - Pike w/ Ent-E Data - 51+ hostiles mainly
crews.notes: Mainly for use with 52+ level hostiles, as Chen/Tlaan are no longer effective. The boost from Pike to Data's officer ability really increases isolytic damage output and includes cascade.

crews.name: Hostiles - Pike w/ Ent-E Picard - 51+ hostiles mainly
crews.notes: Mainly for use with 52+ level hostiles, as Chen/Tlaan are no longer effective. The boost from Pike to officer ability increases isolytic damage output for 3 rounds by a percentage each time you hit with a weapon and includes cascade.

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Advanced
crews.notes: Stack of health. check minimum level requirements suggested closely! This crew requires a max vidar ideally and good research. when experimenting with this crew ensure you check your mitigation is as close to Max (71.2%) as possible. Mudd at rank 5 will add additional chance to his proc rate and ultimately yield better results. 5 of 11 and Harrison at higher ranks will also increase effectiveness.

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Alternative Crew (<52 level Hostiles)
crews.notes: 5 must be min rank 2 for this set up to net more probes than Pike hostile crew

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Increase Cargo Crew
crews.notes: Once you are able to fill cargo when hunting Borg Probes, try this crew to see if you can increase your take home of inert probes. if you do not fill your cargo, then return to previous crew that did until vidar is stronger. NB: if you have Cath unlocked from the Ferrengi officers at a rank offering a higher damage reduction percentage than your T'laan then swap Cath her over T'laan.

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Increased Cargo Alternative
crews.notes: Stack Attack for SNW Uhura as a priority and Health for Five of eleven. This crew Provides Increased cargo, synergy to FIve of Eleven who is providing additional cargo to speed up runs. SNW Uhura adds to mitigation for FIve specific to fighting Battleships with an Interceptor.

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Picard (<52 level Hostiles)
crews.notes: Exception to this is when hitting level 29 probes where you would swap Chen for T'Laan due to their firing pattern. Better to use Pike version of this crew if you need to level the ship you are using at the same time.

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Picard vs 33s (<52 level Hostiles)
crews.notes: If T'Laan is NOT maxed then swap for Chen

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Pike (<52 level Hostiles)
crews.notes: Exception to this is when hitting level 29 probes where you would swap Chen for T'Laan due to their firing pattern

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Pike Vs 33s (<52 level Hostiles)
crews.notes: If T'Laan is NOT maxed then swap for Chen

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - SNW + Loot
crews.notes: Stack Attack for Uhura. Five of Eleven there to increase loot gained per probe to help fill hull faster. typically better for more advanced vidars, ideally maxed with a decent level of research.

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - Vs 33s not using Pike/Picard
crews.notes: This crew keeps Chen free for other grinding. If T'Laan is NOT maxed then swap for Chen

crews.name: Hostiles - Probes - vs Level 29 Borg
crews.notes: Should fill cargo providing Vi'dar is at least tier 7 with the top gun upgraded. Five Of Eleven can be swapped in for 8 or Nine Of Eleven if you have her - This would increase your loot drops and speed up your run

crews.name: Hostiles - Punch up crew (51+)
crews.notes: The higher rank ghrish is the higher warp you can reach. This crew offers a blend of warp range to allow you to hit in higher systems and the combat abilities of Janeway and Ent-E Data. None of the bridge crew have damage mitigation so add Paris or WoK McCoy below deck which ever is higher to increase survivability.

crews.name: Hostiles - Repuation Grinding
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five of Eleven. Loot boost from 5, and rep gains from Ghalenar and Harry Kim. Add The Doctor and Alonzo Freeman below deck for additional reputation gains. Target the highest level Survey ships ideally for the biggest reputation gain.

crews.name: Hostiles - Silent - Chang Crew - No max BLT
crews.notes: SNW spock for all ship types to improve crit chance whcih feeds into Changs abaility to delay weapon fire from the enemy. This crew us most effective if you have Max Belanna torres below deck.  See crew Chang - w/max BLT. Trip is there to reduce crit damage of the hostile which is one of its most potent.abilities. If flying and explorer this crew has additional potency as you can stack defence for increasing mitigation when fighting explorers. Lorca (or gorkon if better for you) to provide hull breach needed to proc Chang.

crews.name: Hostiles - Silent - Chang Crew - w/max BLT
crews.notes: SNW spock for all ship types to improve crit chance whcih feeds into Changs abaility to delay weapon fire from the enemy. This crew is most effective if you have Max Belanna torres below deck. If not see crew Chang - no Max BLT. Trip is there to reduce crit damage of the hostile which is one of its most potent abilities. If flying and explorer this crew has additional potency as you can stack defence for increasing mitigation when fighting explorers.

crews.name: Hostiles - Silent Enemies - Boosting Trip
crews.notes: Trip works best here when rank 2+ This crew is working directly against the silent enemy ship ability of increaing crit damage, boosting trips ability with pike and Moreau effectivley takes trips abbility and increases it to 220% of origional value.

crews.name: Hostiles - Silent Enemies - Iso + Crit damage reduction
crews.notes: Only use this crew if you do not lose shields using it, as Janeway is sending more damage to them. Doctor is providing mitigation, Janeway officer asbility is providing additional Isolytic damage and Trip is reducing Crit damage which is massivley increases from the silent enemies ship ability. consider using the appropriate below deck officer to proc the state for the ship being used (kim for morale on an explorer for example) Hugh and BTL are musts below deck if torres is rank 4+

crews.name: Hostiles - Silent Enemies - Isolytic build
crews.notes: Only use this crew if you do not lose shields using it, as Janeway is sending more damage to them. Doctor is providing mitigation and ent E data and Janeway officer asbilities are providing additional Isolytic damage. consider using the appropriate below deck officer to proc the state for the ship being used (kim for morale on an explorer for example) Hugh and BTL are musts below deck if torres is rank 4+

crews.name: Hostiles - Silent Enemies- Severus crew
crews.notes: This crew requires you to have Severus with full synergy, his Captains manouve requires YOUR ship to be burning which is a special ability of the silent enemies. Add Hugh, Belanna Torres and the doctor below deck for additional loot and fire power, but consider swapping for Paris should you need extra mitigation(i.e. you lose shields without him and are taking too much damage)

crews.name: Hostiles - Silents - Phlox T1-T3
crews.notes: Using Pike and Moreau to boost the ability of Phlox reduces the Critical Chance of the hostile which is one of silent emnemies key strengths. When Phlox is ranked up, you will be able to drop Moreau and consider adding Trip Tucker and If phlox maxed no Pike, Moreau needed. Hugh, Belanna Torres, Tom Paris, Chapel are all great options for below deck.

crews.name: Hostiles - Silents - Tier 4 Phlox
crews.notes: Moreau is not needed in this crew, as Pike alone will get phlox over the 100% making him super effective. If T5 Phlox then no Pike needed. Ent E data providing crucial Iso Damage, essential for the Gorn. Hugh, Belanna Torres, Tom Paris, Chapel are all great options for below deck.

crews.name: Hostiles - Silents - Tier 5 Phlox
crews.notes: Phlox will reduce critical Change to Zero. Five is providing aditional mitigation and loot boost. Ent E Data providing crucial Isolytic damage. Hugh, Belanna Torres, Tom Paris, Chapel are all great options for below deck.

crews.name: Hostiles - Species 8472 Bioships
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five of Eleven and Attack for Kang. This Crew offers piercing bonus from Kang, additional Damge with Hull breach with Lorca (consider swapping Lorca for Gorkon if Hull Breach chance is better). Five is boosting loot gained. As you are limited by the number of Hostiles you can spawn Loot is essential so if you hav the doctor put him below deck with Hugh ideally.

crews.name: Hostiles - Survey Parts Grind
crews.notes: Stack Health for SNW Hemmer. Use PIC Beverley Crusher below decks. This crewsCan be used by any Ship as neither Hemmer or SNW Pike require a certain Ship Type

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Alternative with Beverley
crews.notes: Stack for Attack and Defence to fuel Kang and Beverley. Swap Jaylah to captain if during the battle you do not lose shield to increase loot bonus. Beverleys captain manoeuvre restores shields and if in battle logs you do not lose Shield then you do not need as captain and can benefit from the extra loot from Jaylah as captain

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Alternative with Five
crews.notes: Stack Health and Attack for Five of Eleven and Kang respectivley. Use when other hostile crew are busy

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Cadet Crew
crews.notes: Never use Chen for swarms. Can swap Cadet Kirk for Cadet Mccoy.

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Crit Damage Loadout
crews.notes: Stack attack for Kang and defence for SNW Spock. This crew offer Hull Breach potential and piercing boost from Kang, mitigation Boost from SNW Spock and increasing critical chance from Khan. Very good for critical damage events.

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Full SNW
crews.notes: Stack Defence for SNW Spock. Can Swap La'an with another officer of the engineering group as she is only on the bridge to give full synergy to SNW Pike

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Hull Breach - Crit events!
crews.notes: Stack attack for Kang and defence for SNW Spock. This crew offer Hull Breach potential and piercing boost from Kang, mitigation Boost from SNW Spock and extra shots Vs swarm from Jaylah. very good for critical damage events.

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Max Loot
crews.notes: Crew will net more frequency Modulators than any other standard swarm crew in each hull of your Franklin-A. If you lose shield when hitting hostiles, then swap Beverley to captain for her shield regeneration ability. This will reduce loot per hostile but may result in more Kills per hull.

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Picard no Jaylah
crews.notes: Never use Chen for swarms.Better to use Pike version of this crew if you need to level the ship you are using at the same time. stack defence for Beverley

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Picard with Jaylah
crews.notes: Better to use Pike version of this crew if you need to level the ship you are using at the same time. stack defence for Beverley

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - Pike no Jaylah
crews.notes: Never use Chen for swarms

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - SNW with Jaylah
crews.notes: Stack Defence for SNW Spock. Good Crew for Crit damage events due to the changes SNW Pike causes to the split of damge done to Hull Vs Shields

crews.name: Hostiles - Swarm - TNG Crew
crews.notes: Never use Chen for swarms. Direct alternative to Cadet crew and to be used until Pike is unlocked. Can swap Next Gen Data for Next Gen Crusher

crews.name: Hostiles - Tal VS Battleships with SNW
crews.notes: Stack Attack for SNW Uhura. Great Punch up Crew for Hostiles with large hull and Low damage per round. you need buring to activate Tal who is the key to this crew, so can swap Nero for Georgiou if you yield better results

crews.name: Hostiles - Tal VS Explorers with SNW
crews.notes: Stack Defence for SNW Spock. Great Punch up Crew for Hostiles with large hull and Low damage per round. you need buring to activate Tal who is the key to this crew, so can swap Nero for Georgiou if you yield better results

crews.name: Hostiles - Tal VS Interceptors with SNW
crews.notes: Stack Health for SNW Ortegas. Great Punch up Crew for Hostiles with large hull and Low damage per round. you need buring to activate Tal who is the key to this crew, so can swap Nero for Georgiou if you yield better results

crews.name: Hostiles - Tal with Beverley
crews.notes: Stack Defence and Health for Beverley. Great Punch up Crew for Hostiles with large hull and Low damage per round. you need buring to activate Tal who is the key to this crew, so can swap Nero for Georgiou if you yield better results. If Cagro is important consider using the 'Hostiles - Tal with 5' Crew

crews.name: Hostiles - Tal with Five of Eleven
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five to increase mitigation. Great Punch up Crew for Hostiles with large hull and Low damage per round. you need buring to activate Tal who is the key to this crew, so can swap Nero for Georgiou if you yield better results. If Cargo is not important consider using the 'Hostiles - Tal with Beverley' Crew to see which performs better for you.

crews.name: Hostiles - Texas Class - Auto grind Loot Crew
crews.notes: Stack Health for Ortegas. Hugh, belana torres and the doctor Below deck. Check after a full run and if cargo bay fills before your ship dies then add Ent-E Data or SNW La'an to your below deck as not to watse loot

crews.name: Hostiles - Texas Class - Five Crew
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Marcus and Health for Five of Eleven. Consider swapping Lorca for Gorkon if you do not have Lorca at t3. if you have t4 or above Belanna Torres sub Lorca/Gorkon for SWW Ortegas or Khan.

crews.name: Hostiles - Texas Class - Janeway Crew
crews.notes: If B'elanna Torres is high tier (4 plus) consider moving to below deck if you have the slot and change for another synergy officer or add SNW Ortegas or Marcus for addition potency.

crews.name: Hostiles - V'ger Orion
crews.notes: NEED T5 Torres below decks. Good crew for punching fast

crews.name: Hostiles - Voyager ability efficiency
crews.notes: Stack health and attack for Five and Kang respectively. % improves mitigation in all areas, while kang increases piercing vs hostiles which are mainly interceptors in the voyager loop. Neelix reduces the cost of sumoning hostiles meaning you can stretch your Deutirium Canisters Further. Hugh, The Doctor and Belana Torres Below deck also will assist your performance.

crews.name: Hostiles - Xindi - Loot + Isolytic damage
crews.notes: This crew blends Loot from Archer and Trip while bosting damage output with Isolytic with janeway. You also get boost in crit damage from Archers officer ability and reduce oponents crit damage with Trip

crews.name: Hostiles - Xindi - Loot Crew - Archer
crews.notes: Max loot Crew Trip providing synergy and critical reduction of the enemy. Consider full synergy for Archer if Five of eleven below rank 3 to gain a higher loot bonus. If you are finding kills difficult consider adding Janeway, Ent-E data or picard as an alternative to Trip to bolster damage output.

crews.name: Hostiles - Xindi - Loot Crew - No Archer
crews.notes: This is the Ideal Crew for fighting the Xindi to capitalise on getting the most loot the fastest. The Doctor below deck to furthier increase this. Criticals and Hull breach will be dependant on your research into your critical damage floor.

crews.name: Hostiles - Xindi Battleships - Meta Crew
crews.notes: This is the Meta Crew for the Xindi Aquatic loop, but still useless without the NX01. The target you hit with this crew is entirely dependant on your NX01 hull health and the chart which dictate this can be found in our discord. If you have a max neelix, then swap Nero for Five or Eleven for additional loot. If buring is needed for your set up of ships consider adding Nero to this set up in place of Lorca as Neros key stat is health and will feed the mitigation Captains ability of Sisko. But ensire you find have a Hull Breach officer on another ship.

crews.name: SOLOS - ALL - SUPPORT - Enterprise - Bev and Burning
crews.notes: Stack Attack for Georgiou and Defence for Beverley. This Crew provides burning to your opponent and can trigger any burning Ship/officer ability within your armada. When burning Damage output will be increased by Georgiou and mitigation provded by Beverley. Kirk Provides Morale to keep the shilds up with the enterprises Ship ability.

crews.name: SOLOS - ALL - SUPPORT - Enterprise - Mitigation
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Zhou. Crew increases Mitigation while activiating the Enterprise ship ability to increase survivability. Georgiou can be changed for another officer like a Hull breach officer if not already used on another ship.

crews.name: SOLOS - ALL - SUPPORT - Eurydice survivability
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Beverley to increase Mitigation. This Crew can keep your ship alove for a number of extra rounds. Eurydice will activate once shields fall, and have a chance to restore shield again saving damage to the hull and has a chance to keep you alove longer and take more damage away from other ships. Picard and Bev are there fundementally to enure that Eurydce ability activates by boosting it, but the secondary benefit of the mitigation from Beverley is a huge bonus.

crews.name: SOLOS - ALL - SUPPORT - No Sisko but O'Brien
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Beverley. Miles has a Change to increase Shots so should be in your set up somewhere. consider this crews for a ship already with lot of shots in its firing pattern. Riker provides a cumulative Damage increase each round and mitigation is boost provided by Beverley.

crews.name: SOLOS - Boost Shots and Iso Cascade
crews.notes: Pike Boosting the extra Shots ability of Miles and the ISO Cascade from Demarco

crews.name: SOLOS - boosted damage output + Mitigation
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Beverley. Also works for invading entities.

crews.name: SOLOS - BORG - Main - Five + Damage
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five of Eleven. Not using Six of eleven here as the armadas Statistics are so large that his ability is diluted. Miles offers chances at extra shots and as this would be your strongest ship then you get the most effectivness out of him. Khan to increase crit chance.

crews.name: SOLOS - BORG - Main/Support - Borg Queen
crews.notes: Stack Health for Five of Eleven. Queen increases Crit Chance while providing synergy to Five. replacement of Six for the queen can yeild very good results because six has limited time to provide big benefit because the stats of Borg Solos are so high, so the increased crit chance has more effect!

crews.name: SOLOS - Damage output + mitigation alternative
crews.notes: Stack Defence for Beverley. Also works for invading entities.

crews.name: SOLOS - JEMHADAR - MAIN(Strongest Ship by Power)
crews.notes: Most Effective on your ship with the biggest power due to the loot bonus from 5 then being applied to the largest portion of the armada Loot. Stack Attack and Health. This Crew provides both Mitigation and penetration while increasing critical chance. Swap Khan for kirk if main ship is the Enterprise and look to add khan to another crew if needed

crews.name: SOLOS - Main/Support - Chakotay Full Synergy
crews.notes: Full Synergy Crew for Chakotay to double your shots. Iso lytic Cascade from Janeway and increase crit damage from Seven (made more potent by increase of crit chance also from Chakotay). This is all out attack based so consider Tom Paris below deck and stacking for Defence for some mitigation.

crews.name: SOLOS - Single Ship loot Crew
crews.notes: If Five of Eleven is below rank 3, add synergy to Dajash tolra instead for better loot gain. Use all tools below deck, Belanna Torres, Harry Kim, Neelix, Paris, Vael. Demarco should be part of any armada crew due to her damage output increase.

crews.name: Strike Team Battleship  - NO ST La'an
crews.notes: If you do not have ST La'an, using HG Worf increases your Critical hit chance . if fighting explorers consider swaping Ortegas to captain for a chance of burning.  If attained consider adding Seven of Nine Below Deck for PVP isolytic damage.

crews.name: Strike Team Battleship - Full Synergy
crews.notes: The current PVP META (most effective tactics availiable) for PVP using a battleship only!  If attained consider adding Seven of Nine Below Deck for PVP isolytic damage.

crews.name: Strike Team Battleship + D'Jaoki
crews.notes: Stack Health. Option if no ortegas held or if you need an extra boost of mitigation offered by D'Jaoki. If attained consider adding Seven of Nine Below Deck for PVP isolytic damage.

crews.name: Strike Team Explorer - Full Synergy
crews.notes: Only for explorers in PVP. If Weyoun not attained can subsitute in Kirk, TOS Kirk or PIC Picard as an alternative.  If attained consider adding Seven of Nine Below Deck for PVP isolytic damage.

crews.name: Strike Team Interceptor - Full Synergy
crews.notes: Only Effective on an Interceptor. Based around Hull Breach ability so if you do not have Ducat then choose an officer that can cause a Hull breach such as Gorkon or Lorca.  If attained consider adding Seven of Nine Below Deck for PVP isolytic damage.

crews.name: Summoning
crews.notes: Most efficiency jump and summoning crew for Discovery. Promoting Culber increases efficiency further. Saru can be swapped out for Georgio or Arium and maintain the same efficiency.

crews.name: Territory Capture - Revival Crew
crews.notes: Use on cheap ship such as realta during takeovers to be resurrected once destroyed in attempt to gain additional points. Specific side officers are completely optional for this build.

crews.name: Wave Defence - Speed - Riker Full Syergy
crews.notes: This crew is ideal for Wave defence but also when you want a hostile job doing quickly. Riker provides Speed and Synergy adds more to this. Data and Picard as officers boosts the isolytic damage output with their respective officer abilities. Paris is recommended below deck for mitigation.

crews.name: XP grinding - Alternative
crews.notes: Crew where you have not attained the Shakedown Cruise officers (Currently only available through purchase packs) If you do not yet have pike would suggest using chen to help survivability

crews.name: XP grinding - No Pike - Battleship
crews.notes: Allows you to grind ship xp while keeping Pike free for other tasks
